name: Mia Software Development
description: Scaffold a structured front-end + back-end Node app on SQLite for a NON-technical user, secure-by-default (ask before exposing data, keys in env, escalate to Voltek). Board task 2E. Bundles the mia-software-dev skill (the rules) + scaffold tools. Does NOT modify the core.

projectsDir.description: Directory where generated projects are scaffolded. Default: <workspace>/projects.

defaultDatabase.description: Database for generated apps. SQLite by default (local file, nothing exposed).
